creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 206121
vuln.xml entry for py-matrix-synapse

Here's an attempt at a vuxml entry. This passed validation for me and should hopefully contain all the necessary information. 

I ran the teststuit for this version before submitting the port and got "the usual results":

Ran 712 tests in 182.507s  
FAILED (skips=1, errors=1, successes=710) 

The one failed test is due to a missing module (parameterized, not in ports and only required for the teststuite).

I've had this version running on my production server for the last few days, where it seemed to work fine as well. :)
